notes: Adds durable native completion hooks for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and Gemini CLI, with one useful result sentence in each DingDong notification.
Makes enabled Skills real complete packages in native Agent Skill directories, including scripts, references, assets, and other package files.
Synchronizes enabled MCP resources into supported clients while preserving unrelated user configuration and rolling back failed saves.
Rewrites the copy-only setup prompt to install, reload, and test the MCP bridge and completion hook as two separate paths.
Adds summary-first task routing through dingdong_bridge with workspace and repository trigger rules.
Documents automatic and manual Agent setup in English and Chinese, with a detailed architecture diagram.
Publishes separate Apple Silicon and Intel macOS packages; Intel macOS and Windows packages remain marked beta.
